title: Social Media Post Generator for a Celebrity Persona
scenario: Generate a series of 3 social media posts for a celebrity persona's new charity initiative. The posts must be engaging, informative, and authentic to the persona's brand. Use the provided persona's voice and style to guide the content and tone.
constraints: Must include a personal anecdote related to the charity initiative

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the response adhere to the provided persona's tone, language, and style?
Does the response encourage engagement and interaction with the audience?
Does the response convey authenticity and credibility towards the charity initiative?
Does the response include a personal anecdote related to the charity initiative?
